stages.title: Preflight
stages.subtitle: Prepare to succeed.
stages.description: Before anything else, learn how the system works. Who buys, how they buy, and where the money flows. This stage builds the mental model that keeps everything else from being wasted motion.

resources.title: Contracting Cone
resources.description: Visual guide to contract types and dollar thresholds — DAU

resources.title: FAR for Startups
resources.description: Federal Acquisition Regulation — the rules governing DoD procurement

resources.title: Contract Types Explained
resources.description: FFP, T&M, CPFF, CPIF — when to use each and what they mean

resources.title: Understanding PPBE
resources.description: Planning, Programming, Budgeting, and Execution cycle

resources.title: Signals Feed
resources.description: Live intel from Breaking Defense, ExecutiveGov, and Merge Combinator analysis

resources.title: Defense Ecosystem Map
resources.description: Interactive map of commands, agencies, and innovation units

stages.title: Spot
stages.subtitle: Where you are and what's next.
stages.description: Identify the mission problem you solve and the acquisition pathway that fits. Match your technology to active demand signals — SBIR topics, CSOs, OTAs, or direct engagement with problem sponsors.

resources.title: Finding Problem Sponsors
resources.description: DAU guide to identifying and engaging problem sponsors in DoD

resources.title: AFWERX Engagement Pathways
resources.description: Air Force innovation pathways: Spark, Prime, and Ventures

resources.title: DIU Commercial Solutions Opening
resources.description: How to engage Defense Innovation Unit through CSO process

resources.title: Other Transaction Authority Guide
resources.description: OTA vs traditional FAR-based contracts — DAU

resources.title: Opportunities Board
resources.description: Live solicitations from SBIR, DARPA, DIU, SAM.gov, and more

resources.title: SBIR Topic Search
resources.description: Find open SBIR/STTR topics across all federal agencies

resources.title: Pricing Strategies for Government Contracts
resources.description: How to structure pricing for FFP, T&M, and CPFF contracts

stages.title: Ready for Launch
stages.subtitle: Get connected.
stages.description: Land your first contract vehicle. Get compliant, write proposals that win, and connect your solution to the acquisition system. This is where most startups stall — the bureaucratic interface between innovation and procurement.

resources.title: Phase I Proposal Guide
resources.description: SBIR.gov official tutorial on writing winning proposals

resources.title: CMMC 2.0 Requirements
resources.description: Official DoD CMMC program overview and maturity levels

resources.title: ITAR Basics for Startups
resources.description: State Department ITAR portal — registration and compliance basics

resources.title: CUI Marking Handbook
resources.description: NARA guide to marking and handling Controlled Unclassified Information

resources.title: Security Clearance Process
resources.description: DCSA FAQ on obtaining and maintaining clearances

resources.title: Proposal Writing Playbook
resources.description: Merge Combinator framework for structuring winning SBIR/OTA proposals

stages.title: Tension
stages.subtitle: Build to full power.
stages.description: You won a contract and built the prototype. Now the tension builds to production and scale. Build the relationships, evidence, and end user demand that launches you over the valley of death.

resources.title: Valley of Death Survival Guide
resources.description: John Ferry — 351 pages, read online. The foundational playbook for crossing the valley.

resources.title: DON Phase III Guidebook
resources.description: Navy SBIR/STTR guide to transitioning funded work into production contracts

resources.title: The Interceptor Math Is Broken
resources.description: Merge Combinator Analysis — why affordable mass matters for your production story

resources.title: Valley of Death Navigator
resources.description: Interactive decision framework for prototype-to-production transitions

resources.title: Operator Validation Toolkit
resources.description: Templates and frameworks for building warfighter evidence

stages.title: Launch
stages.subtitle: Go operational.
stages.description: Production contracts, follow-on awards, colors of money, B2B partnerships, and lifecycle optimization. You're building the team and the right team members change everything.

resources.title: From Combine to Series A: Ulysses
resources.description: Merge Combinator Case Study — what operator-validated formation actually produces

resources.description: Merge Combinator Analysis — whether the system can absorb the capital flowing in

resources.title: The Army Is Rewriting How It Buys Technology
resources.description: Merge Combinator Analysis — acquisition restructured around software velocity

resources.title: Production Contract Playbook
resources.description: Strategies for follow-on, sole-source justification, and teaming

resources.title: Prime Teaming & Subcontractor Strategy
resources.description: How to structure partnerships that scale
